messages.content: # Here is how to fix errors that contain “ DWrite: (Filename not Available) "

## To fix this issue, you will have to free up space on your drive. I recommend freeing up 20GB at the bare minimum.

# Method 1
## Step 1
> Open file explorer > Right-click on your disk drive > Click properties > Click on disk clean up > Remove some of the files (Temporary files is constantly increasing in size)

## Step 2
> Uninstall games you do not play from steam.

## Step 3
> Delete videos/files you do not use.

## Step 4
> Compress the Assetto Corsa folder: https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1322215435223044096

# Method 2
> If you have enough free space, follow this method

> Go to `Settings > Assetto Corsa > Video` and lower your video settings.
> - Make sure `MSAA` is not `8x`, 
> - `Shadows Resolution` is not above `2048x2048` and 
> - `Rendering Frequency` is set to `two faces per frame`.
